heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly to mostly cloudy, with a chance of rain near the Massachusetts border. Highs from the upper 30s to mid 40s, with low to mid 30s north of Route 2. North to northeast winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Tonight
text: Snow or wintry mix near and south of Route 4, and a chance north to Route 2 after midnight; a glaze of ice possible, and 1 to 3 inches of snow and sleet. Lows from the upper teens to mid 20s east, mid 20s to around 30 west. Winds becoming east 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Any snow or mix south of Route 2 tapering off in the morning, and possibly lingering into the early afternoon in southern New Hampshire; little or no additional accumulation. Highs from the mid 30s to around 40, with some lower 30s east of the Greens, and low to mid 40s in the St. Lawrence Valley. Winds becoming southeast 5 to 15 mph, and gusting to 25 mph in the Champlain Valley.
